flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Carnegie Mellon University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($34.6k → $40.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carnegie Mellon University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.9k → $66.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carnegie Mellon University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Carnegie Mellon University are 95% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($114.9k vs $59.0k).
